rationale: Review 2 identifies a larger-scale placement problem: the file sits under AlgebraicGroup/ but contains only generic bialgebra/Hopf-algebra extensions with no algebraic-group infrastructure, so splitting into Bialgebra/Convolution.lean and HopfAlgebra/Convolution.lean is a material reorganization. Review 1 correctly flags one lemma's namespace but leaves the overall misplacement untouched, resulting in a less-well-placed PR.
